title: Closing apps
drDigitalIntro: ⚠️ Careful: don't actually press Ctrl+Q (or Control+Q) right now — on a real computer that would close your whole browser! In this lesson, just click the red X inside the playground on the right to practice closing an app safely. To just move a window out of your way instead of closing it, click the yellow minus button next to the red X.
drDigitalSuccess: Red X to close, yellow minus to tuck it away — you've got it!
drDigitalHint: Open an app in the playground and try the red X and the minus button, then click Continue.
